name: accounts/MOCK/locations/PUNE/reviews/r1
comment: Celebrated my son's 7th birthday here and it was magical! The party host Priya kept 15 kids entertained for 3 hours straight. The trampoline arena and foam pit were a huge hit. Slightly pricey but worth every rupee.

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/THANE/reviews/r2
comment: Bacchon ko bahut maza aaya, staff bhi friendly tha. Bas weekend pe bahut zyada crowd ho jata hai aur wait karna padta hai. Weekday pe jao toh best experience.

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/ABC/reviews/r3
comment: Very disappointed and angry. My 5 year old daughter twisted her ankle on a trampoline spring that was exposed, and the staff on duty took 10 minutes to even bring a first aid kit. No one in charge came to speak to us. This is a serious safety issue and I expect someone to contact me.

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/M5/reviews/r4
comment: Charged me twice for socks at the counter and the staff refused to give a refund, said system issue and to come back later. Why should I come back for your billing mistake? Fun place but billing process is a mess.

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/JSR/reviews/r5
comment: Kids enjoyed the rides and soft play area. But the washrooms were dirty and there was no soap. For the ticket price I expect basic hygiene to be maintained.

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/NGP/reviews/r6
comment: बहुत ही शानदार जगह है बच्चों के लिए। स्टाफ बहुत अच्छा है और सुरक्षा का पूरा ध्यान रखते हैं। हम हर महीने आते हैं।

name: accounts/MOCK/locations/GHT/reviews/r7
comment: Entry counter staff was extremely rude. We had booked online and they still made us wait 40 minutes and spoke very badly when we asked. Never coming back.
